title: Home Garden Ornaments Plant Pots Indoor, Indoor Plant Pot - Decorative Plastic Flower Pots with Glossy Crystal Surface (Diameter: 12cm, Colour: White)
features: High quality plastic with glossy crystal design. These plastic plant pots feature a unique glossy crystal surface, providing a modern and luxurious look. Made from durable materials, they are a lightweight and long-lasting alternative to ceramics or terracotta.

No drainage holes for flexible use. Designed without drainage holes, these pots prevent water spills, making them ideal as indoor plant pots. Factory-marked spots allow easy customization if drainage is required, offering versatility for different planting needs.

Perfect for all types of plants. From orchids and succulents to herbs and cacti, these planters work beautifully as orchid pots, succulent plant pots, or general planters. They enhance the beauty of any plant setup while blending seamlessly into various spaces.

Variety of sizes and colors. Available in sizes ranging from small (12 cm) to large (30 cm), these pots cater to all gardening needs. Choose from vibrant colors to match any décor, making them ideal for balconies, gardens, or living rooms.

Decorative and functional design. The stylish crystal-inspired design adds sophistication to any space. These plastic flower pots are perfect as planters for houseplants, balcony décor, or large indoor plant pots, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.
description: Product Description Modern Decorative Pots Glossy Plant Pots Bring your space to life with our beautifully designed plant pots featuring a glossy, crystal-style surface. Their rich, live colours and elegant shine make them perfect indoor planters or decorative plastic pots for any room. Ideal for all kinds of plants — from bonsai trees, succulents, aloe, cactus, dracaena, and echeveria, to aromatic herbs like chives, coriander, dill, mint, parsley, rosemary, sage, and tarragon. Also perfect for blooming varieties such as geranium, gerbera, hyacinth, ivy, lavender, narcissus, orchid, pansy, poinsettia, polypody, primrose, spathiphyllum, and violets. Add a touch of elegance to your house plants and create a vibrant indoor garden full of texture and colour. Elegant Crystal Design Discover beautifully crafted plastic plant pots with a unique crystal-style surface and modern, decorative shapes. Each pot combines elegance and simplicity – the perfect choice for every plant lover. The original design and wide range of vibrant colours bring a touch of creativity to your house garden, kitchen, patio, office, or balcony. Choose your ideal size and colour to match any space or style. Stylish, durable, and lightweight – these indoor planters are an elegant way to display your favourite flowers and plants. No Drainage Holes Versatile Use – With or Without Holes Our plant pots are designed without drainage holes, allowing you to use them either as decorative covers or as functional planters. Each pot includes a factory-marked spot where holes can be easily drilled if needed, giving you full control over watering and setup. Perfect for both indoor planters and outdoor plant displays, these pots adapt to any space or plant type. For Every Plant Perfect Indoors & Outdoors Ideal for seedlings, herbs, spring plants, cactus, and many other indoor and outdoor plants. These versatile plant pots help you create a unique, cozy atmosphere inside your home and stay durable outside — resistant to frost, rain, and bad weather conditions. Stylish, practical, and reliable – perfect for every plant lover’s garden. Modern Eye-Catching Design Made with Love and Passion Live colours with a glossy crystal surface finish ,very elegant and simply in its best option for plant lovers. Interesting design and wide selection of colours will allow for a bit of "madness" Modern Glamour Pots Unique Crystal Design – Glamour Series Discover something truly different with our Glamour Series crystal plant pots. Their unique crystal-inspired form and elegant shine bring a luxurious accent to any space, capturing the attention of even the most sophisticated tastes. Each decorative flower pot features a modern shape that reflects light beautifully, adding style and individuality to your interior. Available in a wide range of sizes and colours, so you can easily choose the perfect pot for your plants and décor. Our flower pots are designed for versatility — ideal as indoor garden planters, outdoor flower pots, plant boxes, or flower baskets. Perfect for your home, office, balcony, or garden, they fit both modern and traditional décor styles. These vivid, crystal-look planters make stunning decorative items and can even complement wedding decorations or special occasions. Available in round shapes and various sizes — from small pots to very large planters — they adapt to all spaces and plant types. Perfect for bonsai trees, succulents, cactus, roses, and more, these elegant plant pots combine beauty and practicality in every detail. Product dimensions Plant Pots Crystal 12 cm 12D x 12W x 11.5H centimetres Plant Pots Crystal 14 cm 14D x 14W x 13H centimetres Plant Pots Crystal 16 cm 16D x 16W x 15H centimetres Plant Pots Crystal 18 cm 18D x 18W x 16.5H centimetres Plan pots Crystal 20 cm 20D x 20W x 18.5H centimetres Plant Pots Crystal 25 cm 25D x 25W x 23H centimetres Plant Pots Crystal 30 cm 30D x 30W x 28H centimetres Home Garden Collection Timeless Garden Design Home Garden Ornaments Collection Discover the beauty and quality of the Home Garden Ornaments range – a collection of elegant flower pots and plant pots designed to enhance any space. Our line includes indoor garden planters, outdoor flower pots, plant boxes, and decorative flower baskets, perfect for your home, office, balcony, or garden. Available in a variety of shapes – round, square, or oval – and a full range of sizes from small to very large, these plastic plant pots are ideal for every type of plant, including bonsai trees, succulents, cactus, and roses. Made from high-quality plastic, they combine durability with elegant style, making them perfect for both modern and traditional décor. Their timeless design and colour variety make them excellent decorative accents for any occasion, from daily home use to special events like weddings or parties. Create a beautiful indoor or outdoor space with our versatile garden pots – stylish, lightweight, and designed to make every plant stand out. Elegant Crystal Look Planters Red Crystal Planters Add a bold touch of colour with these red crystal-look plant pots. Their glossy surface and diamond texture create a modern, elegant accent for any indoor garden or home décor. Made from high-quality plastic, they are lightweight yet durable, perfect for both house plants and decorative displays. The vivid red shade instantly brightens any living room, kitchen, or office space, bringing energy and style to your surroundings. Available as a set of two, these decorative plant pots combine functionality with design – ideal for succulents, flowers, or green plants of all kinds. Gold Crystal Planters Add a touch of luxury to your home with these gold crystal-look plant pots. The glossy diamond texture reflects light beautifully, bringing warmth and sophistication to any indoor décor. Made from durable, high-quality plastic, these decorative planters combine elegant design with everyday practicality. Their rich gold tone enhances both modern and classic interiors, making them perfect for living rooms, offices, balconies, or kitchens. Sold as a set of two, they are ideal for displaying succulents, flowers, or green plants, adding glamour and balance to your indoor garden. White Crystal Planters Brighten your interior with these elegant white crystal-look plant pots. Their glossy, faceted surface creates a clean and modern accent that complements any home décor. Crafted from durable, lightweight plastic, these decorative planters offer the beauty of ceramic while remaining easy to handle and maintain. Perfect for indoor plants, succulents, or flowers, they add a sense of freshness and harmony to any room. Sold as a set of two, these white plant pots fit perfectly in living rooms, offices, balconies, or kitchens, enhancing both modern and minimalist spaces. Cream Crystal Planters Add warmth and subtle elegance to your space with these cream crystal-look plant pots. Their soft colour and faceted texture create a calm, sophisticated accent that blends perfectly with any interior décor. Made from premium, lightweight plastic, these decorative planters offer the refined look of ceramic with the practicality of durable materials. Ideal for indoor plants, succulents, and flowers, they bring a natural, timeless charm to your living room, kitchen, balcony, or office. Available as a set of two, these cream plant pots fit seamlessly into both modern and classic interiors, enhancing your indoor garden with elegance and style.
